languages.text: "Сектор Бионика — это особая часть медотсека, место, где с помощью аугментики и имплантации возвращают к жизни безнадежно раненых. Взамен потерянным органам мы устанавливаем освященные технологии и даруем калечным возможность вновь служить Богу-Императору. Ассистенты и медикарии сектора подчиняются мне, техножрецы — генетору Ферренцу. Не каждое судно может похвастаться врачебным консилиумом подобного уровня".

traits.locale_text: "Сектум Бионика — это место, где проводят самые сложные и важные медицинские операции на корабле. Я достаю с того света безнадежных и дарю им новую, железную плоть. Мой коллега... Отвечает за распределение аугментических ресурсов и их обработку".

languages.text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."
languages.original_text: "Сектор Бионика — это особая часть медотсека, место, где с помощью аугментики и имплантации возвращают к жизни безнадежно раненых. Взамен потерянным органам мы устанавливаем освященные технологии и даруем калечным возможность вновь служить Богу-Императору. Ассистенты и медикарии сектора подчиняются мне, техножрецы — генетору Ферренцу. Не каждое судно может похвастаться врачебным консилиумом подобного уровня".

traits.locale_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medbay where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."

"The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medbay, where the most serious wounds are treated with implants. We replace lost organs with consecrated augmentations and give the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The assistants and medicae officers here report to me and to Genetor Extremis Ferrenz."

"The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medbay, where the most serious wounds are treated with implants. We replace lost organs with consecrated augmentations and give the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The assistants and medicae officers here report to me and to Genetor Extremis Ferrenz."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカは、医療区の特別区域で、最も深刻な傷はインプラントで治療されます。失われた臓器は聖なる増幅器で置き換えられ、傷ついた者は再び神皇帝に仕える機会が与えられます。このアシスタントやメディカエ・オフィサーは、私に報告するだけでなく、ジェネトール・エクストレミス・フェレンツにも報告します」
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medbay, where the most serious wounds are treated with implants. We replace lost organs with consecrated augmentations and give the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The assistants and medicae officers here report to me and to Genetor Extremis Ferrenz."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカは、医療区の特別区域で、最も深刻な傷はインプラントで治療されます。失われた臓器は聖なる増幅器で置き換えられ、傷ついた者は再び神皇帝に仕える機会が与えられます。このアシスタントやメディカエ・オフィサーは、私に報告するだけでなく、ジェネトール・エクストレミス・フェレンツにも報告します。」

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika, onarılamaz şekilde yaralanmış kimselere hayatlarını geri vermek için ogmetikler ve implantlar kullandığımız özel bir sıhhiye tesisi bölümüdür. Kayıp organları kutsanmış teknolojilerle değiştiriyor ve sakatlara bir kez daha Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etme şansı sunuyoruz. Sektör asistanları ve sıhhiye subayları bana rapor verir, Tekno Rahipler ise Genetör Ferrenz'e bağlıdır. Çok az gemi, böyle kaliteli bir sıhhiye konsilini bünyesinde barındırmakla övünebilir."
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika, onarılamaz şekilde yaralanmış kimselere hayatlarını geri vermek için ogmetikler ve implantlar kullandığımız özel bir sıhhiye tesisi bölümüdür. Kayıp organları kutsanmış teknolojilerle değiştiriyor ve sakatlara bir kez daha Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etme şansı sunuyoruz. Sektör asistanları ve sıhhiye subayları bana rapor verir, Tekno Rahipler ise Genetör Ferrenz'e bağlıdır. Çok az gemi, böyle kaliteli bir sıhhiye konsilini bünyesinde barındırmakla övünebilir."

languages.text: «El Sector Bionica es un lugar especial de la instalación medicae donde tratamos las heridas más graves con aumentos e implantes. Reemplazamos órganos perdidos con tecnologías consagradas y otorgamos a los tullidos la posibilidad de volver a servir al Dios Emperador. Los ayudantes y oficiales de medicae del sector están bajo mi mando, mientras que sus tecnosacerdotes responden ante el Genetor Ferrenz. Hay pocas naves con un concilio médico tan cualificado».
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."

traits.locale_text: «El Sector Bionica es un lugar especial de la instalación medicae donde tratamos las heridas más graves con aumentos e implantes. Reemplazamos órganos perdidos con tecnologías consagradas y otorgamos a los tullidos la posibilidad de volver a servir al Dios Emperador. Los ayudantes y oficiales de medicae del sector están bajo mi mando, mientras que sus tecnosacerdotes responden ante el Genetor Ferrenz. Hay pocas naves con un concilio médico tan cualificado».

languages.text: “仿生区是一个特殊的医疗区域。在这里，我们运用植入物，让遭受不可逆损伤者重获新生。我们用圣化过的技术替代损伤的器官，让伤残者能够再次为神皇效力。仿生区的助手和医务官均向我汇报工作，而技术神甫则向基因士费伦茨汇报。拥有如此水准的医疗委员会，在舰船中实属罕有。”
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."

traits.locale_text: “仿生区是一个特殊的医疗区域。在这里，我们运用植入物，让遭受不可逆损伤者重获新生。我们用圣化过的技术替代损伤的器官，让伤残者能够再次为神皇效力。仿生区的助手和医务官均向我汇报工作，而技术神甫则向基因士费伦茨汇报。拥有如此水准的医疗委员会，在舰船中实属罕有。”

languages.text: « Le secteur Bionica est une division de l'installation de medicae qui se spécialise dans la pose d'implants et d'augmétiques afin de ramener à la vie ceux et celles dont les blessures seraient autrement irréparables. Nous remplaçons les organes perdus par des technologies consacrées afin de permettre aux victimes de continuer à servir l'Empereur-Dieu. Les assistants et les officiers de medicae du secteur sont sous ma responsabilité tandis que les technoprêtres sont sous celle du genetor Ferrenz. Rares sont les vaisseaux qui peuvent se targuer d'avoir un consilium medicae d'une telle qualité. »
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."

Nous remplaçons les organes perdus par des technologies consacrées afin de permettre aux victimes de continuer à servir l'Empereur-Dieu. Les assistants et les officiers de medicae du secteur sont sous ma responsabilité tandis que les technoprêtres sont sous celle du genetor Ferrenz. Rares sont les vaisseaux qui peuvent se targuer d'avoir un consilium medicae d'une telle qualité. »

languages.text: "Der Sektor Bionica ist ein besonderer Bereich der Medicae-Einrichtung, in dem wir irreparable Verletzungen mit Augmentationen und Implantaten behandeln. Wir ersetzen verlorene Organe durch gesegnete Technologien und bieten den Versehrten die Chance, dem Gottimperator erneut zu dienen. Die Assistenten und Medicae-Offiziere des Sektors erstatten mir Bericht. Seine Techpriester unterstehen Genetor Ferrenz. Nur wenige Schiffe können sich mit einem Medicae-Konzil von so hoher Qualität brüsten.
languages.original_text: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured.
